description: Create a cross-sell analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. You must create two custom calculated columns: 'Tech Revenue' (Sales where Product Category is 'Technology') and 'Furniture Revenue' (Sales where Product Category is 'Furniture'). Then, create a Scatter Plot visualization with 'Tech Revenue' on the X-axis, 'Furniture Revenue' on the Y-axis, and 'Customer Name' as the Category/Color to show the correlation of spending by customer. Save the workbook as 'Cross_Category_Analysis'.
